productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Pune Warriors Match Black Cap
description: CompositionBlack polyester cap made of Clima Cool material with comfort Fit, crown made of breathable mesh and team graffiti in front with silver stripes along visor and adjustable strap with buckle at the backWash careHand washThe men in black are all out to take the IPL by storm in their performance. Made of Clima Cool material and breathable mesh along the crown, this Pune Warriors cap from adidas ensures you stay dry and comfortable while you cheer the team to victory. The buckle at the back allows you to adjust the fitting accordingly to allow the cap to stay snug around your head, while the stylish symbol of the Pune Warriors adorns the front crown, making it an ideal cricket cap.
